title: Incorrect results in SQL set operators INTERSECT and EXCEPT
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE t (a Int32 NOT NULL, b String, c Date);
CREATE TABLE u (x Int32 NOT NULL, y Float32, z UInt8);
INSERT INTO t (a, b, c) VALUES (1, 'test', '2023-01-01');
INSERT INTO u (x, y, z) VALUES (1, 1.5, 1);
SELECT * FROM (SELECT a, b, c FROM t) INTERSECT (SELECT x, y, z FROM u);
key_bug_features: Incorrect results from SQL INTERSECT and EXCEPT operations
